title: The Talisman Woman
overview: This is the story of a man who had just moved into a particular apartment.

title: Zanbai
overview: This is the story of a man who went to a particular village in the country on a business trip...

title: The Family Rule
overview: This is the story of a boy named Toshiharu who moved back to the country with his parents.

title: Hair
overview: This is the story of a teacher at a particular elementary school who had to work a bit late one day...

title: The Next Floor
overview: This is the story of a particular family that went shopping for their young son's birthday present at a department store...

title: The Overhead Rack
overview: This is the story of a particular man who did nothing but work, work, work, day in and day out...

title: Contradiction
overview: This story begins with a phone call that was received at a particular young woman's home, in the middle of the night...

title: The Umbrella Goddess
overview: This is the story of a particular boy who went to visit his friend, who had just moved out to the country...

title: Cursed
overview: This is the story of a particular mother and daughter who were inflicted with a terrible curse...

title: The Moon
overview: This is a story about the members of a particular high school baseball team staying in a lodge for training camp...

title: Video
overview: This is a story that three middle school students experienced on the last day of summer vacation...

title: Tomonari-kun
overview: This is the story of a high school girl and some young boys who lived in a particular housing complex...

title: Tormentor
overview: This is the story of a particular group of boys attending an elementary school in the country...

title: Taro-chan
overview: This is the story of a particular rookie police officer who displayed his ventriloquism ability at a traffic safety meeting...

title: The Kitchen
overview: This is the story of a female college student who was invited to visit the home of her friend from high school...

title: Inside
overview: This is the story of a particular boy who found a worn-out old doll, and his family...

title: The Wall Woman
overview: This is the story of a particular college student who fell in love with a woman living in the housing complex across the street...

title: The Locker
overview: This is the story of a girl in high school who had a crush on a boy...

title: Nao-chan
overview: This is a story that happened to a particular boy and his family...

title: The Capsule Toy Machine
overview: This is the story of a businessman who was distressed because his work wasn't going well...

title: Farewells
overview: This is the story of a particular man who came to visit the village where his relatives lived...

title: Ominie-san
overview: This is the story of a new teacher who moved from Tokyo to teach at a middle school in the countryside...

title: Bugged
overview: This is the story of a man who faithfully wrote in his journal every day...

title: Picking Up
overview: This is the story of a particular college student who picked up something forgotten on a train's overhead rack...

title: Netsuke
overview: This is the story of a particular female college student who came to help at her grandmother's store...

title: Bringer Drums
overview: This is the story of a particular married couple that moved to a village in the countryside...

title: Lend It to Me
overview: A young man visits a bathhouse. A woman on the other side continually asks him for things, which he finds strange since no one else is in the bathhouse.

title: Tunnel
overview: Two men are travelling and run out of gas in a tunnel.

title: Rat
overview: A young couple moves into an apartment infested with rats and the young lady is bitten by one.

title: The Noisy Hospital Room
overview: A man in a hospital notices strange noises coming from a hospital room.

title: Museum of Taxidermy
overview: A young couple visits a taxidermy museum.

title: "That Side" Festival
overview: Two girls attend a festival, but something strange happens.

title: Behind
overview: At the Kuchiya Inn, during a school field trip, all of the students are asleep, except for three boys. One of them, Osamu, tells his friends he doesn't want to sleep because he's been having a nightmare recently.

title: The Empress Doll
overview: Two teenage couple visit an abandoned house for a test of courage. They find a set of dolls where the Empress doll is missing.

title: The Fourth Man
overview: Two high school students run into the handshake men.

title: Merry-go-round
overview: A young couple are at a mall carnival and the young woman is offered a free ride on the carousel.

title: Cuckoo Clock
overview: A young girl visits her grandmother and is obsessed with a cuckoo clock on the wall.

title: In the Water
overview: A boy sneaks into a closed swimming pool.

title: Drawings
overview: A teacher notices a boy drawing pictures of people who end up missing.

title: Tongue
overview: A business on his way home from work spots a cat lying lifelessly in the road after being hit by a car. He carries it to the sidewalk, but it's clearly beyond help, so he makes a grave for it and heads home. That night, while relaxing at home, he hears what sounds like a kitten's cry.

title: Fish Tank
overview: A boy in middle school learns of a creepy old house near his school. He decides to check it out and, once inside, discovers a large fish tank in one room. Curious to know what's in it, he cautiously peers through the glass.

title: Sewing Shears
overview: A young woman in college has moved into a certain old apartment building. As she is unpacking her belongings, she sees a spot on the wooden floor where a mismatched board has been added. Curious, she lifts the board to find a dirt surface with a pair of rusty scissors stuck in the ground -

title: Red High Heel
overview: A business has missed the last train after working overtime. He tries to hail a taxi some distance from the train station, but is unable to catch one. As he's wondering what he should do, he spots a vacant taxi racing along an empty street at high speed and finally manages to catch a ride.

title: Night Bus
overview: A group of college students sets off on a night bus to go on vacation. On the way, one of them develops a stomachache and asks the driver to stop at a service area along the highway. But when he returns from the bathroom, the atmosphere inside the bus is very different..

title: Guess Who?
overview: A high school student is visiting an amusement park with an older member of her club, whom she has a crush on. She's thrilled at the prospect of going on this date with the senpai she admires. But on the way home, they see a creepy woman on the train platform, and from that point onward, the girl's head is overtaken by a frightening suspicion.

title: Footsteps
overview: A husband, after finally receiving some time off, accompanies his wife on a shopping trip. Along the way, he receives an invitation from a friend to go out for drinks. To avoid upsetting his wife, he replies to his friend in a bathroom stall, but then he notices some creepy writing on the wall.

title: Cassette Tape
overview: A man has returned to his hometown to attend the wedding of a friend from elementary school. To please his family, he arrives a day early to stay at his parents' home the night before. As he's marveling at how his childhood bedroom hasn't changed at all, he discovers a cassette tape in a desk drawer labeled "What Happened Today" and decides to listen to it.

title: Grinding Teeth
overview: An office lady uses some of her paid leave to go on a trip with her coworkers, but during the trip, she develops a toothache. Hoping to get it fixed even though she's on vacation, she visits a local, old-looking dental clinic. The dentist takes one look at her tooth and shoves pliers into her mouth to pull it without asking for her approval.

title: Calling Crane
overview: Some middle school girls are staying over at a classmate's house. At school that day, the girls had agreed to perform a ritual at the sleepover that they believe will let them speak to the dead.

title: White Line
overview: A new teacher is staying after school grading tests for her class. When she glances out the window, she sees a student in an unfamiliar, old-looking school uniform, laying white powder lines in the schoolyard.

title: Snow Hut
overview: A boy in elementary school has been brought to the snowy country by his parents to visit his grandparents over winter break. He doesn't often see snow, so he's overjoyed to have snowball fights and build snow huts with his cousin. Then, in a grove of trees, they find a snow hut with no entrance.

title: Underground Walkway
overview: A college student is caught in a sudden rainfall on the way home from a night out drinking. He attempts to take shelter until the rain stops, but discovers an underground path to the train station and heads down it.

title: Wrong Number
overview: The story of a family leading a rather affluent lifestyle. A young woman realized her dream and married an elite businessman. However, contrary to her ideal, her new husband works so much that he has no time for his family, and things aren't going as smoothly as she'd imagined with her new stepchild. One day, as she's beginning to feel he exhaustion of this new life wearing on her, she receives a phone call. It sounds like someone's tried to call the nursery school and reached her by mistake...

title: Give It to Me
overview: The story of a certain office lady. On her way home from work, she meets a young girl in the park who persistently asks her to give her things. The moment she begins to see her past self in this young girl, things take a frightening turn. Can she escape the darkness of material desire?

title: The Crow Children
overview: The story of a woman and her young daughter visiting family in the countryside. On the way there, they meet a somewhat eerie-looking old woman dressed all in black, and this meeting entangles the mother and daughter in something disturbing. What did the little girl see in a seemingly ordinary flock of crows?

title: Copycat
overview: The story of two girls who have been together in all things since they were children. Yukari has always been the type who wanted to do everything her best friend Haru did. It's unclear whether she acts out of envy, love, or madness, but her feelings become a darkness that leads to a tragic fate...

title: Shadows of Women
overview: The story of a woman who wishes for happiness after getting married. However, her husband always comes home late from work, leaving her feeling doubtful. One night, she discovers several emails from a woman on her husband's phone, and accuses him of cheating on her. But that was only the beginning of a dark world she would wish she had never known...

title: Giveback-sama
overview: The story of a high school girl who is heartbroken after her boyfriend left her for her best friend. She's still in shock when she stumbles upon a book of incantations. One incantation in its pages sucks her into a whirlpool of terror.

title: Hide-and-Seek
overview: The story of a family visiting the countryside. The grandma tells her grandson Takeshi that he must not go near the house with the mountain behind it. But Takeshi, during a game of hide-and-seek with his cousins, disobeys his grandma and enters the forbidden house. From there, Takeshi is led into a world of darkness...

title: The Neighbors
overview: The story of a college student who's just moved into a new apartment. As she's enjoying life in her new home, she hears strange sounds coming from next door. She doesn't yet know of the world of madness that visits from within loneliness... This night enveloped in stillness will never again return, and there's nowhere to run...

title: If You Want to See Ghosts
overview: The story of a college student who loved to gossip. A rumor has been spreading among her friends that lures them to the depths of fear. When she peers into a friend's eyes, she can see a white silhouette. At this moment, no one knows that this was only a glimpse into a terror that has yet to begin...

title: Flower Reading
overview: The story of a company employee waiting at a bus stop. On a rainy night, a young girl with an ethereal feel about her begins the child's game of flower reading with a bloom held in her small hand. Is she a dream, or an illusion? Her readings toy with his mind more and more. As he watches the petals fall, the man learns of his own fate...

title: I'm the Only One
overview: The story of an office lady who was very proud of her beautiful hair. It's so beautiful that she is the envy of all her friends, and their constant compliments intoxicate her. She gazes at herself in the mirror, never realizing that a tragic disaster awaits her. Is it jealousy or resentment that resides in her bewitching black hair?

title: The Last Bus
overview: The story of an office lady living a peaceful life. One day, on her bus ride home, she saw a strange woman wearing a kimono, but she decided to pretend she hadn't seen her. Then terror struck... The bus continues to roll along, carrying her resentment on board...

title: Seductress
overview: The story of a stunningly beautiful woman. A certain reporter lies in wait after learning of a strange incident in which young men have been disappearing. In the midst of his investigation, he encounters a certain woman, and watches as she seduces men one after another. The shocking last installment...

title: Thunderous Visitor
overview: Thunder rumbles on a stormy night. At a certain house where Ryousuke, a high school boy is currently home alone, the phone rings just moments after the power goes out. Then a flash of lightning displays the shape of a person outside the window...

title: Tomonashi Cave
overview: A group of high school students is visiting a certain cave on a field trip. A small group of them enters a corridor leading away from the main cave... but one of them, Tomoko, is ultimately left alone. After a few moments, she hears the screams of her classmates from deep inside the cave...

title: The Wind's Warning
overview: Hideaki is a salaryman who lives alone in a company housing unit. One night, when he returns from the office, he hears the wind blowing through the open balcony door. Memories of a tragic event one month ago then take over Hideaki's mind...

title: Swamp Offering
overview: Haruko moves to a village in the countryside to live with her new husband's family, On the way, he tells her about a custom in the village that requires its residents to toss their most prized possessions into a swamp. Shortly after they arrive at his family's home, Haruko is forced to join in this ritual with the rest of the villagers...

title: The Dripping
overview: Shimada, a salaryman, stops by a convenience store on his way home from work. It suddenly starts to rain, and he doesn't have an umbrella, so he "borrows" one that he finds on the umbrella rack. But as he walks along with the umbrella open, he senses a darkness approaching from behind...

title: Sakura
overview: Shouta has been admitted to a hospital in the countryside after a car accident. He finds himself regularly conversing through the wall with two children in the room next to his. Eventually these conversations leave Shouta with a sense of fear...

title: Frog Eggs
overview: Takuya is a very shy boy who has moved out to the countryside to live with his grandfather. Takuya felt he didn't belong anywhere in Tokyo, and even here, he still doesn't fit in with the local kids and continues to fear the eyes of strangers. One day, Takuya stumbles upon a cluster of frog eggs and finds them strangely fascinating...

title: Sea Fortunes
overview: On a certain remote island, a group of concerned fishermen surround Chisato, a young woman trembling in fear. What could have happened to her? Eventually, she tells the terrifying story, which started when she drew a fortune from a certain shrine...

title: Mud Games
overview: Mika drives through the rain to pick up her daughter, Michiko, from day care. She tries to talk with Michiko on the way home, but as their conversation carries on, Mika remembers something horrifying...

title: Trees of Innocence
overview: Twin boys, Takashi and Satoshi, are playing in a forest. The energetic Takashi talks the shy Satoshi into climbing a large tree, but as they do, Satoshi recalls something that had vanished from his memory...

title: Frozen Memories
overview: Shirou is climbing a mountain when he gets caught in a severe blizzard and takes shelter in a nearby shack. The blizzard worsens, and Shirou braces himself to wait it out. But soon, disturbing sounds fill the shack, bringing terror he never expected...

title: Waterfall Drop
overview: Yurika is traveling with her friends from college. The group finds themselves at a waterfall deep in a forest that wasn't mentioned in their guidebook, and they hear what sounds like objects falling over the roar of the water...

title: Echoes
overview: Two young women, Eriko and Shiho, are climbing a mountain. Shiho is having a great time hearing her own voice echo in the mountains, but Eriko just wants to enjoy the view in peace. Then a man's voice breaks through the still air, and the echoes Eriko and Shiho hear suddenly bring a sense of fear...

title: Delivery
overview: Katagiri is housesitting for his friend, who's traveling and needs someone to be there to accept an important package he's expecting. The delivery finally arrives late that evening, but his friend says he's expecting another package the next day and asks him to stay one more night. Katagiri begins to wonder what is in these packages that's so important...

title: The Sleepless Child
overview: Sawako and her young son wait alone at their home in the suburbs for her husband to come home. As the night drags on, Sawako's uneasy feeling begins to turn into fear...

title: The Reception Room
overview: The expedition crew finally make their way inside of Banagawa castle, where they confront the tyrannical machine shogun.

title: Paintings
overview: A certain young man visits an art exhibit after receiving a free entry ticket. The lady at the reception desk seems creepy enough, but all the paintings in this bizarre exhibit are like nothing he's seen before. When the young man does something he was advised not to do, an unexpected fate awaits him...

title: Notice of Termination of Service
overview: Hamano is visiting a certain small town on a business trip. On the way to his hotel, he passes by several funerals, which makes him wonder if the town suffered some sort of accident. That night, as he's settling in at his hotel...

title: The Veranda
overview: Hamano is visiting a certain small town on a business trip. On the way to his hotel, he passes by several funerals, which makes him wonder if the town suffered some sort of accident. That night, as he's settling in at his hotel...

title: Public Phone
overview: Chie suddenly gets a call from her younger sister during work asking for her help. She heads toward the phone booth that her sister directed her to, but an unusual sight awaits her... What could have happened to Chie's sister?

title: Cough
overview: Takayuki lives in an old, wooden apartment building, where he spends every day in an ongoing quarrel with his elderly neighbor. One evening, he hears violent coughing through the thin wall, along with the pained voice of the old man...

title: The Woman in the Elevator
overview: The residents of a certain apartment complex are taking the elevator early one morning. The day starts out like any other, but is soon warped by terror...

title: Manga Cafe
overview: Matsudera works at a certain manga café. One day, a guest asks if he has found a misplaced earring, and that's where the terror begins...

title: Little Sister's Room
overview: Matsudera works at a certain manga café. One day, a guest asks if he has found a misplaced earring, and that's where the terror begins...

title: Fitting Room
overview: A certain office lady discovers a little boutique in town. She become excited by the nostalgic clothes inside and loses herself in her own memories. But when the truth is revealed, she also loses something else...

title: Refrigerator
overview: The story of a close-knit family. The children look forward to their mother's cooking, and the parents watch out for their children. They live a happy life... but that happiness begins to change. What will become of this family?

title: Dropped Handkerchief
overview: This is the story of a group of youngsters who have come to an abandoned house to test their courage...

title: Death Day
overview: This is the tale of a certain family's tradition...

title: Don't Look Back
overview: This is the story of a certain young man who has lost his way...

title: Bean-Throwing
overview: This is the tale of a certain boy...

title: The Sound of Laughter
overview: This is the story of a certain high school student who was studying for his entrance exams, late at night...

title: Catch of the Day
overview: This is the story of a certain man who enjoys fishing...

title: Issun Boshi
overview: This is the story of a certain college student...

title: Viewing
overview: This is the story of a certain high school student...

title: Antlion Pit
overview: This is the story of a certain office worker...

title: Footprints in the Snow
overview: This is the story of what happened to a certain pair of siblings on a snowy day...

title: Curse
overview: This is the story of a certain high school student...

title: String Telephone
overview: This is the story of a certain high school student...

title: Sleeptalking
overview: This is the story of a college student enjoying a chat about his childhood...

title: Rat's Wedding
overview:
Teranishi is invited to attend a wedding ceremony in a village where he is on a business trip.

But the village has an unusual custom of holding a funeral and a wedding at the same time...

title: The Man in the Rabbit Hutch
overview:
Rika is a teacher who spends her late nights reading children's essays.

When she reads one of the children's essays, she finds a horrible ending...

title: The 44th Sheep
overview:
Hayakawa is a university student and his friend Irie.

Irie, who suffers from insomnia, mentions the mysterious existence of the "44th sheep".

That night, when Hayakawa can't sleep, he casually counts the sheep...

title: Lapdog
overview:
Mizuki starts working as a pet-sitter.

She takes on the job of walking "Umeta", a dog protected by an old woman living in a deserted village.

However, there are a number of incidents in the village...

title: Papier-mâché Tiger
overview:
Shigeyuki has just lost his beloved son in an accident.

His wife has left him in shock, and he finds himself staring at the papier-mâché tiger he made with his son the day before the accident...

title: Spirit Ox
overview:
Koichiro wakes up from a long nap.

In the kitchen, his wife, Akiko, is cooking dinner, and Koichiro's favorite dishes are on the table.

As he eats, Koichiro realizes that he had a similar day yesterday...

title: Mr. Rooster
overview:
A bass player named "Chicken-kun" joins a band.

Mikio, a member of the band, is curious about the mysterious behaviour of "Elder Boy".

Who the hell is he?

title: Rocking Horse
overview:
A company man lives happily ever after with his wife and son.

One day, he receives an old wooden horse from his parents' house.

That night, the man begins to wander through a labyrinth of memories...

title: Snake Celebration
overview:
Ami is invited to her husband's parents' house for the first time.

She is welcomed by her in-laws and her younger brothers, and is allowed to stay at their house for the night.

She falls asleep and is woken up in the middle of the night to be told that they are celebrating her birthday...

title: Boar Meat
overview:
Nao is a shy girl who has moved from Tokyo to a primary school in the countryside.

She can't fit in with her class, and is lonely, planting winter peonies in her garden.

When a strange girl comes to talk to her...

title: Dragon Palace
overview:
Yusuke is invited to go night fishing by Takayuki, his senior at work.

When Yusuke is left alone to buy a drink, a strange old man approaches him and calls out to him.

Yusuke goes back to Takayuki to report the incident, but Takayuki is looking down with a dark face...

title: Monkey Prayer
overview:
Natsuki has recently transferred to Chiaki's class.

One day, when Chiaki is alone with her in the classroom after school, she tells him a strange story about a "monkey match"...

title: Year of the Cat
overview:
Naoyuki is an art designer at a major design firm.

His junior colleague, Mitsutaka, tells him a strange story about the real reason why cats were not included in the twelve signs of the Chinese zodiac, and that there are actually people in the world who are in the year of the cat...

title: A Job to Quit
overview: This is the story of a certain man who's not sure what to do...

overview: This is the story of a certain group of siblings whose father has died at home, unnoticed by anyone...

overview: This is the story of a certain middle schooler...

overview: This is the story of a certain man who is late heading home, after going out for drinks...

overview: This is the story of a man who has arrived at a certain location to get a story....

overview: This is the story of a woman whose best friend died a year ago...

overview: This is the story of a pair of men who met at a drive-in...
